title.en: The territory of Guheng Mountain, Taiheng City.

content.en:
The territory of Guheng Mountain, Taiheng City.

Ye Tian came here, he couldn't get close to Guheng Mountain directly, otherwise he would be regarded as an invasion and killed directly.

And Taiheng City is a city completely controlled by Gu Heng Mountain.

Some forces affiliated with Gu Heng Mountain and some foreign bone transformation realms can enter this city to live and cultivate, and this place is also the same as the Eternal Ancient Demon City, where they can be traded freely.

At the same time, Taiheng City was also one of the places where Gu Heng Mountain recruited other Bone Transformation Realm cultivators.

Taiheng City, Taiheng Palace.

Ye Tian came here and directly expressed his intention.

A seventh-stage bone transformation realm stationed in the Taiheng Hall glanced at Ye Tian and said lightly, "What talent do you have?"

"I'm an ancient genius!"

Ye Tian said.

"It's not enough!" the seventh-time bone transformation realm said, "In the land of eternity, there are many primordial-level geniuses, but the bone transformation realm primordial-level geniuses are difficult to cultivate, and the cost is too great. The price required to cultivate a seventh-time bone transformation realm primordial-level genius was even greater than cultivating an ordinary nineth-level bone transformation realm. Moreover, it is difficult for primeval-level geniuses to grow to the seventh bone transformation realm, so the major forces are not very enthusiastic about primordial-level geniuses, and the same is true for our Gu Heng Mountain. If we recruit as long as it is an primeval-level genius, we can recruit tens of thousands. "

This seven-time bone transformation realm is very realistic, but it is true.

Gu Heng Mountain's own strength is very strong, there is no shortage of an ancient-level genius, and there is not even a lack of a Ninth Bone Transformation Realm.

If you don't have a certain talent, Gu Heng Mountain will not recruit you, unless you have a background, such as the descendants of a strong person in Gu Heng Mountain or those who are introduced, it will be easy to be recruited by Gu Heng Mountain.

And like Ye Tian, whose origin is unknown, he is just an ancient-level genius, and he wants to join Guheng Mountain, but it is a bit difficult.

"I'll do it on the other side!"

Ye Tian said again.

"The art of the other side?"

This seventh-time bone transformation realm took a serious look at Ye Tian.

If the primeval-level genius adds the art of the other side, then he is indeed qualified to join the Gu Heng Mountain.

First of all, the art of knowing the other side means that it has mastered a lot of the other side of the black text, if the other side of the sea text is not available in the ancient Heng Mountain, it is equivalent to bringing more of the other side of the black text to the ancient Heng Mountain, which will help the growth of the ancient Heng Mountain.

Therefore, for such a bone transformation realm, Gu Heng Mountain is still quite welcome.

"Fight me, okay?"

This seventh-time bone transformation realm said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian followed this seventh-time bone transformation realm to a void in the Taiheng Hall to fight.

"Go all out!"

This seventh-time bone transformation realm said.

"Then you're welcome!"

Ye Tian shot with all his might.

Rumble!!!

The Ancient Realm!

Ancient God Demon Spear!

Ye Tian unleashed the top-notch Ancient Technique of a gate, showing his peak combat power.

This seventh-time bone transformation realm was a little surprised when he saw the top-notch primeval technique Ye Tian had cast.

This is a top-notch primeval technique, it is very difficult to practice, Ye Tian has practiced so much.

This kind of combat power is between the sixth bone transformation realm and the seventh bone transformation realm.

But.

Gu Heng Mountain's Seven Bone Transformation Realm didn't stay too long, he still showed the strength of the Seven Bone Transformation Realm, he wanted to see if Ye Tian had created the technique of the other side.

Rumble!!!!

The punch of the Seven Bone Transformation Realm struck, the void shattered, and the terrifying fist shattered time and space, reaching the full force of the Seven Bone Transformation Realm.

Ye Tian's speed was fast, but he was locked by the opponent's fist, and it was difficult to dodge.

Just as the fist was about to hit his body, he directly cast the body of the mist on the other side.

Rumble!!!

The body was shattered.

However, what this Seventh Bone Transformation Realm shattered was only Ye Tian's misty body on the other side, not his true body.

Therefore, the attack was ineffective.

However, Ye Tian seized the opportunity and hit the body of the Seven Bone Transformation Realm with a single blow of the Ancient God and Demon Spear, leaving a trace on his body.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian was constantly fighting with this seven-time bone transformation realm, although he couldn't hurt him, but he didn't get hurt by relying on the misty body on the other side.

Of course.

He didn't have more than this other skill, but it was enough to just use it to join Gu Heng Mountain, and there was no need to expose more strength.

Seeing that Ye Tian couldn't help Ye Tian, this seventh-time bone transformation realm felt a little embarrassed, so he said: "Yes, I have used seventy percent of my strength, but I still can't help you, your other side technique is very good, stronger than the ordinary other side of the world!"

Seventy percent strength?

Ye Tian didn't expose the other party, obviously he was ten percent strong!

However, he has not yet joined Gu Hengshan, so there is no need to offend the other party.

"Can I join Guheng Mountain?"

Ye Tian asked.

"There shouldn't be any problem, I'll report it, the results should come out soon, you just wait for the results in Taiheng City!" said the seventh-time bone transformation realm.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tianying said.

After that, he waited in Taiheng City.

Time passed slowly, and it wasn't long before the results came in.

He was favored by Gu Hengshan, and Gu Hengshan was willing to let him join.

......

Guheng Mountain.

Ye Tian was brought here and entered the Guheng Mountain.

Here, he met a venerable lord of Gu Heng Mountain.

The position of Gu Heng Mountain is divided into the mountain lord and thirteen deputy mountain masters, below which are the seventy-two lords, under the lord are the envoys, and under the envoys are the inspectors, and under the inspectors are the largest number of ordinary mountain people.

The strength of these mountain people is not bad, and many of them are in the first or second bone transformation realm.

And below the mountain people are the reserve mountain people, all of whom are Heavenly Ancestors of the Blood Transformation Realm, and they can be promoted to the mountain people at any time and join the Guheng Mountain.

And these reserve mountain people are almost all descendants of some members of Gu Heng Mountain and the blood transformation realm born from the bloodline family, which is why they have such an advantage.

The Venerable Lord Ye Tian saw was an ancient-level genius of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, the Lord of Xun Mountain, and his status in Gu Heng Mountain was very high.

"I've seen the Lord of Mount Xun!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Endless Lord, I know your situation, the top primordial-level genius of the four-time bone transformation realm, and the art of the other side, even if you encounter an ordinary seven-time bone transformation realm, you can protect yourself. Moreover, you should be very close to the fifth bone transformation realm, and there is hope for a breakthrough at any time. But this kind of strength is still very weak in Gu Heng Mountain, so if you join Gu Heng Mountain, I can't give you too high a position. "

"In this way, you start with the first-level patrol envoy, which can allow you to lead a hundred mountain people. "

The Lord of Mount Xun said.

There are six levels of Inspectors, and the first level of Inspectors is the lowest level of Inspectors.

But he just joined Gu Heng Mountain, without any credit, and it was already very good to be able to serve as a first-level patrol envoy.

"Thank you, Lord of Xunshan!"

Ye Tiandao.
